overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit Asian market street in Night City. The player walks through a narrow alley decorated with red paper lanterns, reaches an overlook with a view of a lower market level, then turns and walks back through the bustling vendor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with overhead red lanterns

events.description: emerging from dark doorway into the lit market street
slight right turn while approaching the overlook area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market street, passing under strings of red lanterns and neon signs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside blue food cart on the right side of the street

entered.detail: dozens of red spherical paper lanterns hanging in rows overhead across the street
blue mobile food cart with striped awning and warm neon lighting
traditional Asian-style pagoda roof structure over a shop entrance
large glowing digital billboards and screens on the building walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a transition from a dark doorway into a narrow, vibrant market street lined with red paper lanterns overhead. The player walks forward through the sheltered alley, passing a blue food cart on the right and various neon signs, with traditional Asian architecture mixed with cyberpunk elements visible on the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated viewing platform overlooking multi-level market

events.description: arriving at the metal railing overlooking the lower market level
turning around to face back toward the market street

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook railing looking down at the lower market level, then turning to walk back

notable_agents.action: man in white clothing leaning on the railing looking down at the market below

entered.detail: metal safety railing marking the edge of the upper walkway overlooking the lower level
multi-level market structure visible below with stalls, crowds, and steam vents
tall buildings with vertical neon signage rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the narrow street and arrives at an elevated overlook with a metal railing, revealing a expansive view of a multi-level market below. A man in white stands at the railing observing the activity beneath. After taking in the view, the player turns around to head back through the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with vendor stalls and construction barriers

events.description: beginning to walk back through the market in the opposite direction
passing close to construction barriers on the left side temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking back through the market street, passing the blue food cart again and continuing deeper into the alley past various stalls

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive blue hair standing near a shop entrance

entered.detail: the same blue mobile food cart now visible on the left as we walk back
green neon sign reading 'OPEN' above a small shop entrance
yellow and black striped safety barriers blocking off a section of the alley

segments.scene_description: Walking back through the market, the player passes the blue food cart again now on the left side, and continues deeper into the narrow alley. The path passes yellow construction barriers and a shop with a green neon 'OPEN' sign, with red lanterns now visible ahead in the distance as the alley continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark interior into a vibrant, neon-lit market alley that culminates in an expansive urban overlook before retracing its steps. It begins by emerging from a dark doorway into a narrow street adorned with red paper lanterns, passing a blue food cart and various cyberpunk signs integrated into traditional Asian architecture. As the camera reaches the end of the alley, the space opens up at an elevated overlook with a metal railing, revealing a multi-level market below and a man in white observing the scene. The perspective then turns around to head back through the bustling area, passing the blue food cart again on the opposite side. The movement continues deeper into the alley, gliding past yellow construction barriers and a green neon open sign toward the distant glow of red lanterns.
